verification_log.claim: Article 145(1) puts AG appointment with the Yang di-Pertuan Agong on the PM's advice.
The 2018 Pakatan Harapan manifesto promised the split 'immediately'.
Ten government PKR MPs led by Rafizi Ramli demanded a parliamentary veto on the new prosecutor.
verification_log.primary_source: Search restricted. Cannot verify specific statements from February 2026.

overall_assessment: The analysis offers a sharp, structural critique of legal reform mechanics. It avoids attacking individuals while accurately capturing the paradox of an unchanged appointment route. A slight narrative framing aligns with civil society critiques (Bar Council/dissenters), but it appropriately attributes these to institutional gaps rather than partisan malice.
